case_title: DIVERSIFIED COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. vs. ROCHE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS ROCHE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS ROCHE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCHE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS ROCHE $667.11 PRINCIPAL, $9,718.65 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,399.76, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #872414 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEYS FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT,APP FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. SERVED MAY-14-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS ROCHE
